summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an independent PR inventory shard. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; closed PRs are not given closure actions; open non-security PRs are kept for maintainer or author follow-up based on hydrated preflight evidence.
